name: sms_scheduled_update
description: Update the status of a previously scheduled SMS message batch. Can be used to cancel or pause scheduled messages.

parameters.name: bulkId
parameters.description: The bulk ID of the scheduled message batch (query parameter).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New status for the bulk. Allowed values: 'PENDING', 'PAUSED', 'PROCESSING', 'CANCELED'.
